_meta.description: Curated code examples for the React Native SDK reference pages. Keyed by export name or page section.

CrossmintWalletProvider.note: CrossmintWalletProvider must be nested inside CrossmintProvider. showOtpSignerPrompt defaults to true in React Native, showing built-in OTP dialogs automatically. Set to false to handle signing flows manually via the useWalletOtpSigner hook.

ExportPrivateKeyButton.note: Only works with email and phone signers. Will not render for passkey or external wallet signers.

CrossmintAuthProvider.note: CrossmintAuthProvider must be nested inside CrossmintProvider. Set appSchema to your app's deep link scheme so OAuth redirects return to your app.

useCrossmintAuth.note: Must be used within a CrossmintAuthProvider.

CrossmintCheckoutProvider.note: CrossmintCheckoutProvider must be nested inside CrossmintProvider.

CrossmintEmbeddedCheckout.note: In React Native, when payment.crypto.enabled is true, you must provide a payment.crypto.payer object with the required callback handlers for signing transactions and switching chains.
